name: EuiToast
description: Auto-dismissing notification message shown in the toast list.
visualDescription: A rectangular notification card (~320px wide) with a white or light background and a subtle left-side colored accent border (blue = info, green = success, yellow = warning, red = danger). Contains a bold title line, optional body text, and an × dismiss button in the top-right corner. Appears in a stack in the bottom-right of the viewport. NOT EuiCallOut (callouts are inline; toasts are floating and positioned).
